input.command: gh api repos/aryeko/ghx-bench-fixtures/pulls/comments/2879322105/replies -f body='Agreed. events.content:
Done — I replied to every unresolved review thread on PR `#419` with concrete fix suggestions, and only those unresolved threads.

Replied threads:
- `src/utils/mixed-helpers.ts:14` — typed `formatOutput` via generic (`T`) instead of `any`  
  `https://github.com/aryeko/ghx-bench-fixtures/pull/419#discussion_r2879327351`
- `src/utils/mixed-helpers.ts:18` — `JSON.parse` wrapped with safe `try/catch` + result union suggestion  
  `https://github.com/aryeko/ghx-bench-fixtures/pull/419#discussion_r2879327353`
- `src/utils/mixed-helpers.ts:22` — replace `validateSchema` stub with real validation logic/AJV direction  
  `https://github.com/aryeko/ghx-bench-fixtures/pull/419#discussion_r2879327360`

No code changes were pushed.
